description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:latest Docker image and sets the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Add a pages job (running in the default test stage) that runs the shell command 'hugo', publishes the 'public' directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch to deploy the site to GitLab Pages. Add a test job (also in the default test stage) that runs the same 'hugo' command but is configured with an except rule so it runs on all branches except master.
